backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining Case, Activity, and Document types with persistent state maps, integrating authorization and blob storage mixins, and exposing query/update methods for cases, activities, and documents with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four UI changes: ActivityTimeline showing max 2 comments, phone number inline with contract ID, swapping Customer/Contract ID positions, and adding visual containers around documents.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the Kollect Lite debt collection application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme CSS variables for the Kollect Lite design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kollect Lite application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication check, and conditional rendering of LoginPrompt or authenticated routes (TaskQueue and CaseDetail).
Activity form component with Action/Outcome dropdowns (10 outcome options), comments textarea, History toggle button, collapsible ActivityTimeline, and muted blue-gray Add Comment button that submits activities to the backend.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Timeline component displaying dummy activities per case with timestamp, Action/Outcome badges, colored comment boxes, payment promise highlights, and scrollable container with 266px max-height to show maximum 2 activities at a time.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Displays a clickable card for a debt collection case showing debtor name, status badge, contract ID, DPD (days past due), phone number, and customer ID with copy functionality. Navigates to case detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a checkmark icon for 2 seconds after successful copy, otherwise displays a copy icon.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Manages document display and upload for a case, showing a list of documents with file type icons and view/download actions. Includes file upload with progress tracking and uses dummy document data for 20 cases.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header displaying the Kollect Lite logo, title, and a logout button that clears authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component with header, outlet for nested routes, and footer containing copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login page displaying the Kollect Lite branding and a login button that triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge for case status (escalated, active, or PTP) with appropriate styling for each status type.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating cases, activities, and documents, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes and Kollect Lite brand colors (teal-dark, teal-darker, gray-bg).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component that displays debtor information, status, contact details, financial summary, and includes ActivitySection and DocumentsSection components. Uses dummy case data mapped by case ID from route parameters.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page component that displays a list of collection cases using CaseCard components. Contains dummy data array of 20 collection cases with various statuses and financial details.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage values. Supports both standard query strings and hash-based routing with functions to persist parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations. Includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting four existing features related to activity timeline comment limits, customer summary layout changes, and document section containerization. Contains architectural notes, feature requests, and project metadata.
